questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "relocate"?
questions.explanation: "relocate" có nghĩa là "chuyển chỗ ở".

questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "discover"?
questions.explanation: "discover" có nghĩa là "khám phá ra".

questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "participate"?
questions.explanation: "participate" có nghĩa là "tham gia".

questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "witnessed"?
questions.explanation: "witnessed" có nghĩa là "đã chứng kiến".

questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "experience"?
questions.explanation: "experience" có nghĩa là "trải nghiệm".

questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "already"?
questions.explanation: "already" có nghĩa là "đã rồi".

questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "yet"?
questions.explanation: "yet" có nghĩa là "chưa/đã...chưa".

questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "ever"?
questions.explanation: "ever" có nghĩa là "bao giờ".

questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "never"?
questions.explanation: "never" có nghĩa là "chưa bao giờ".

questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "recently"?
questions.explanation: "recently" có nghĩa là "gần đây".

questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "achieve"?
questions.explanation: "achieve" có nghĩa là "đạt được".

questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "travel"?
questions.explanation: "travel" có nghĩa là "đi du lịch".

questions.question: Choose the best word: I have _____ finished my homework.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "I have already finished my homework." — từ đúng là "already" (đã rồi).

questions.question: Choose the best word: Have you eaten _____?
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "Have you eaten yet?" — từ đúng là "yet" (chưa/đã...chưa).

questions.question: Choose the best word: Have you _____ been to Paris?
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "Have you ever been to Paris?" — từ đúng là "ever" (bao giờ).

questions.question: Choose the best word: I have _____ tried sushi.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "I have never tried sushi." — từ đúng là "never" (chưa bao giờ).

questions.question: Choose the best word: She has _____ moved house.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "She has recently moved house." — từ đúng là "recently" (gần đây).

questions.question: Choose the best word: He has _____d his goal.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "He has achieved his goal." — từ đúng là "achieve" (đạt được).

questions.question: Choose the best word: I have _____led to ten countries.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "I have travelled to ten countries." — từ đúng là "travel" (đi du lịch).

questions.question: Choose the best word: She has lived _____ for years.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "She has lived abroad for years." — từ đúng là "abroad" (ở nước ngoài).

questions.question: Choose the best word: I have known him _____ 2010.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "I have known him since 2010." — từ đúng là "since" (kể từ).

questions.question: Choose the best word: We have lived here _____ five years.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "We have lived here for five years." — từ đúng là "for" (trong (khoảng)).

questions.question: Choose the best word: They have _____ arrived.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "They have just arrived." — từ đúng là "just" (vừa mới).

questions.question: Choose the best word: It was the trip of a _____.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "It was the trip of a lifetime." — từ đúng là "lifetime" (cả đời).

questions.question: Complete the sentence: I ___ already finished my homework.
questions.explanation: Present perfect with 'I' uses 'have'.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: She ___ never been to Japan.
questions.explanation: Third person singular uses 'has'.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: Have you ___ eaten sushi?
questions.explanation: 'Ever' asks about experience in questions.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: They have lived here ___ 2015.
questions.explanation: 'Since' is used with a point in time.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: We have known each other ___ ten years.
questions.explanation: 'For' is used with a period of time.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: He ___ just arrived.
questions.explanation: Present perfect with 'just' for recent action.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: I haven't finished ___.
questions.explanation: 'Yet' in negatives means up to now.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: She has ___ seen that film.
questions.explanation: 'Already' shows something happened before now.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: Have they ___ arrived?
questions.explanation: 'Yet' in questions asks if something happened.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: I have ___ to Paris twice.
questions.explanation: 'Have been to' means visited and returned.

questions.question: Which English word means "chuyển chỗ ở"?
questions.explanation: "chuyển chỗ ở" trong tiếng Anh là "relocate".

questions.question: Which English word means "khám phá ra"?
questions.explanation: "khám phá ra" trong tiếng Anh là "discover".

questions.question: Which English word means "tham gia"?
questions.explanation: "tham gia" trong tiếng Anh là "participate".

questions.question: Which English word means "đã chứng kiến"?
questions.explanation: "đã chứng kiến" trong tiếng Anh là "witnessed".

questions.question: Which English word means "trải nghiệm"?
questions.explanation: "trải nghiệm" trong tiếng Anh là "experience".

questions.question: Which English word means "đã rồi"?
questions.explanation: "đã rồi" trong tiếng Anh là "already".
